name: Wong Fong Industries Limited
summary: Wong Fong Industries Limited, an investment holding company, provides land transport engineering solutions and systems in Singapore, Malaysia, Myanmar, and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Engineering and Training segments. The company sells and installs load handling and waste management systems, as well as assistive technology and mobility aids. It offers truck-mounted cranes, tailgates, tippers, self-loaders, hookloaders, portable compactors, and sweeper vehicles. The company also operates service centers for truck-mounted cranes, hookloaders, and tailgates; and offers design, customization, fabrication, and integration services. In addition, its projects include customization of special purpose vehicles and solutions. Further, the company provides training services for industrial, construction, food hygiene, quality and service audit, consultancy, workplace safety, security, and food and beverage. Additionally, it distributes, rents, and markets heavy and construction machinery, including spare parts, accessories, and engineering works; and trades and installs mechanical handling equipment and truck mounted hydraulic speed loaders. The company also undertakes mechanical engineering works, and installs industry machinery and machinery component parts; offers business and management consultancy services, motivational courses, and provision of educational services and recruitment of personnel, as well as educational and consultancy services to schools, teachers, parents, and community. It serves construction, logistics, waste management, and defense industries. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Singapore. Wong Fong Industries Limited is a subsidiary of Wong Fong Investments Pte. Ltd.
